headline: Global Payments Governance Clash And Valuation Gap Draw Investor Attention
summary: Global Payments (NYSE:GPN) has urged shareholders to vote against a proposal that would allow investors to act by written consent. The proposal was submitted by a shareholder ahead of the company’s upcoming annual meeting. The board’s opposition focuses attention on how much influence investors should have outside the formal meeting process. Global Payments, a large player in payment technology and merchant acquiring, sits at the center of ongoing changes in how businesses and consumers...
